'''shabolo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:loadcell|loadcell]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-b-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:loadcell|loadcell]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| shabolo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæbeleth|shæbeleth]] || [[word:shæbelej|shæbelej]] || [[word:shæbelesh|shæbelesh]] || [[word:shæbele|shæbele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shaboboloth|shaboboloth]] || [[word:shaboboloj|shaboboloj]] || [[word:shabobolosh|shabobolosh]] || [[word:shabobolo|shabobolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shaboloth|shaboloth]] || [[word:shaboloj|shaboloj]] || [[word:shabolosh|shabolosh]] || [[word:shabolo|shabolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shabofloth|shabofloth]] || [[word:shabofloj|shabofloj]] || [[word:shaboflosh|shaboflosh]] || [[word:shaboflof|shaboflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shabolotho|shabolotho]] || [[word:shabolojo|shabolojo]] || [[word:shabolosho|shabolosho]] || [[word:shaboloko|shaboloko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shaboloth|shaboloth]] || [[word:shaboloj|shaboloj]] || [[word:shabolosh|shabolosh]] || [[word:shabolo|shabolo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shabolothol|shabolothol]] || [[word:shabolojol|shabolojol]] || [[word:shaboloshol|shaboloshol]] || [[word:shabolokol|shabolokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shabolothotho|shabolothotho]] || [[word:shabolojojo|shabolojojo]] || [[word:shaboloshosho|shaboloshosho]] || [[word:shaboloko|shaboloko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shabolothon|shabolothon]] || [[word:shabolojon|shabolojon]] || [[word:shaboloshon|shaboloshon]] || [[word:shabolokon|shabolokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shabolothoro|shabolothoro]] || [[word:shabolojoro|shabolojoro]] || [[word:shaboloshoro|shaboloshoro]] || [[word:shabolokoro|shabolokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
